texto: You don't set out to build a wall. You don't say: 'I'm going to build the biggest, baddest, greatest wall that's ever been built.' You say, "I'm going to lay this brick as perfectly as a brick can be laid. You do that every single day. And soon you have the greatest wall that's ever been built." - Will Smith
explicacao: Citação de Sam Thomas Davies sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “You don't set out to build a wall. You don't say: 'I'm going to build the biggest, baddest, great…” articula desenvolvimento-pessoal, goals, habits em registro de desenvolvimento pessoal, com relevância para contextos como habits.
